extension.description: Otak Usage displays estimated API-equivalent costs of Claude Code and OpenAI Codex CLI sessions in the VS Code status bar, with per-model breakdowns for today and the current month.
config.period: Aggregation period shown in the status bar.
config.updateIntervalSeconds: How often to rescan usage logs, in seconds.
config.dailyAlertThresholdUsd: Daily total cost alert threshold in USD. A notification appears when today's Claude + Codex API-equivalent cost reaches this amount. Set to 0 to disable.
config.showClaude: Show Claude Code usage in the status bar.
config.showCodex: Show Codex CLI usage in the status bar.
config.showRtk: Show RTK (Rust Token Killer) token savings in the tooltip. The section is hidden automatically when the rtk CLI is not installed.
config.rtkPath: Path to the rtk executable. Empty = `rtk` on PATH.
config.pricingOverrides: Per-model pricing overrides in USD per million tokens. Example: `{"claude-opus-4-8": {"input": 5, "output": 25, "cacheWrite": 6.25, "cacheRead": 0.5}}`. For OpenAI models use `input`, `cachedInput`, and `output`.
config.claudeConfigDir: Path to the Claude Code config directory. Empty = $CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR or ~/.claude.
config.codexHome: Path to the Codex home directory. Empty = $CODEX_HOME or ~/.codex.
config.telemetryEnabled: Send usage telemetry to an OpenTelemetry (OTLP/HTTP) endpoint, with labels following the OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions. Disabled by default.
config.telemetryEndpoint: OTLP/HTTP base endpoint for telemetry, e.g. `http://localhost:4318`. The `/v1/metrics` path is appended automatically.
config.telemetryHeaders: Extra HTTP headers sent with each telemetry request, e.g. `{ "Authorization": "Bearer <token>" }` for Grafana Cloud or Honeycomb.
config.telemetryServiceName: OpenTelemetry `service.name` resource attribute used for exported telemetry.
config.telemetryServiceInstanceId: Free-form source identifier you choose (any string), exported as the OpenTelemetry `service.instance.id` resource attribute to distinguish where telemetry came from. Empty = not sent.
config.telemetryIncludeTokenUsage: Include per-model token usage (`gen_ai.client.token.usage`) in telemetry.
config.telemetryIncludeCost: Include per-model API-equivalent cost in USD (`otak_usage.cost.usd`) in telemetry.
config.telemetryIncludeRtkTokens: Include RTK token savings (`otak_usage.rtk.tokens`) in telemetry.
